tokens.note: Full Expo tokens exist in user_push_tokens; not printed here.

server_trigger_expected.event: payment completion → scheduleDeliveryRequestDispatch → POST /api/dispatch/delivery-request → runDeliveryRequestDispatch wave=1

dispatch_evidence.interpretation: Wave 1 lock never set → runDeliveryRequestDispatch never completed past the wave-1 lock for this DR. No Expo send occurred for this mission. Dedup cannot apply without a send attempt.

driver_eligibility_geometry.market_note: Even if wave-1 had run with this geometry, this driver would be filtered out (notified:0).

android_channel_audit.note: Incident tokens are iOS; Android channel config is not the root cause of this specific miss.

mobile_long_ring_audit.before_fix: Dependent on DriverHomeScreen activeOffer + isOnline; AppNavigator only navigated / notified refresh
mobile_long_ring_audit.after_fix: handleDriverMissionPushAlert starts mmdAudio.startLongRing('driver') globally on mission push types
mobile_long_ring_audit.stop_conditions: accept / refuse / expire via stopDriverMissionAlert from DriverHomeScreen.stopSound

foreground_bg_lock_other_page.background_locked: depends on OS push sound; iOS push uses short bundled sound, long-ring is in-app

labels.D: ancienne application installée ne contenant pas le correctif

classification.rationale: Zero wave lock, zero offers, zero notification_logs for this DR → A. Device still on 1.0.0 without global driver alert service → D also blocks validation even after server send is fixed.

blocked.exact_cause: No Delivery wave-1 dispatch push was executed for DR 4aac2906… (dispatch_wave_1_started_at null, 0 offers, 0 notification_logs). Concurrent product gaps: driver ~14.7mi outside 5mi radius; long-ring previously tied to DriverHomeScreen; Android channels previously only ensured inside getExpoPushToken; dispatch wrote no audit rows.
validatable_without_build: notification_logs rows on next paid Delivery dispatch (skip / send / no_tokens / no_candidates)
